name: Neural Nomad #02: Indigo — Threshold
description: Everything intact but humming wrong, like a glass about to shatter from a note it can't stop hearing. The indigo hour when you first notice your own outline against what you thought was you.
threshold_note: The edge between sleeping through your life and the first terrible gift of seeing it.
collector_meaning: You hold the moment before the moment — when the crack appears but hasn't traveled yet. Some thresholds we cross backward, eyes closed, already through.
